summary: Installed the remotion skill (Remotion video creation in React) for claude-ds (Claude Code with DeepSeek backend via /usr/local/bin/claude-ds). Skill copied from Codex plugin at /root/.codex/.tmp/plugins/plugins/remotion/skills/remotion/ to /root/.agents/skills/remotion/, symlinked at ~/.claude/skills/remotion → ../../.agents/skills/remotion. Includes 36 rule files covering 3D, animations, audio, captions, charts, transitions, etc.
key_facts: remotion skill installed at /root/.agents/skills/remotion/ with symlink at ~/.claude/skills/remotion/
claude-ds is a shell script at /usr/local/bin/claude-ds that runs Claude Code CLI with DeepSeek backend via a translation proxy
remotion skill sourced from Codex plugin at /root/.codex/.tmp/plugins/plugins/remotion/
remotion skill has 36 rule files covering 3D, animations, audio, captions, charts, transitions, voiceover, etc.
claude-ds proxy runs on port 3800, DeepSeek API key at /root/.deepseek-key
